name: cdfi-superpowers
description: An AI skill layer over Jay Patel's published CDFI Python portfolio. Grounds an AI assistant in audited, empirically-verified CDFI tooling (NMTC eligibility, bank-CDFI peer benchmarking, HMDA descriptive analysis) instead of hallucinating tract eligibility, peer metrics, or lending distributions. No new analytical code — thin skills that pip-install and call the already-published PyPI packages.
